description: You are the station manager for the Georgia Tech Amateur Radio Club (W4AQL). Configure GPredict to interface with the automated satellite ground station hardware. Requirements include: a rotator interface named 'G5500_AzEl' (Host: localhost, Port: 4533, Azimuth: 0-450, Elevation: 0-180); two radio interfaces for full-duplex operation named 'IC9700_DL' (Downlink RX, Host: localhost, Port: 4532) and 'IC9700_UL' (Uplink TX, Host: localhost, Port: 4534); a ground station named 'GeorgiaTech' (33.7756°N, 84.3963°W, Altitude: 320m); and a tracking module named 'AutoTrack' containing satellites ISS (ZARYA) [25544], SO-50 [27607], AO-91 [43017], AO-92 [43137], and CAS-4B [42759]. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
